Simply open `index.html` in your browser: ```bash # Using Python 3 python3 -m http.server 8000 # Then visit: http://localhost:8000 ``` 2. # Spartan Research Station & Trading Agent

> A comprehensive financial market research platform with AI-powered trading capabilities.

## 🎯 Overview

This platform combines:
1. **Spartan Research Station** - Real-time macro economic analysis dashboard with live market data, intermarket barometers, and pattern discovery
2. **Spartan Trading Agent** - An AI-first trading system powered by Claude AI for intelligent trading decisions

---

## 📊 Research Station Features

### Live Market Dashboard
- **S&P 500** - Real-time index tracking
- **10-Year Treasury** - Bond yield monitoring
- **VIX Index** - Market volatility indicator
- **Dollar Index (DXY)** - USD strength tracker

### 10 Intermarket Leading Indicators (Barometers)
- **Tier 1 (6-18 month lead)**: Credit spreads, yield curve, China credit impulse
- **Tier 2 (3-6 month lead)**: Copper/Gold ratio, Baltic Dry Index, market breadth
- **Tier 3 (1-3 month lead)**: AUD/JPY, VIX, Put/Call ratios
- **Composite Risk Score**: 0-100 scale (GREEN/YELLOW/RED status)

### Economic Indicators (FRED Integration)
- GDP Growth Rate
- Consumer Price Index (CPI)
- Unemployment Rate
- Federal Funds Rate

### Pattern Discovery (4 AI Agents)
- BreakthroughAgent: Institutional patterns, sector rotation
- DiscoveryAgent: Hidden correlations, options flow
- PatternAgent: Fibonacci clusters, Elliott Wave
- TimingAgent: COT positioning, seasonal windows

---

## 🤖 Trading Agent Features

- **🧠 Claude AI Core**: Anthropic's most advanced AI at the center of all trading decisions
- **🔌 Modular Architecture**: Plug and play different data sources, brokers, and strategies
- **📊 Multi-Asset Support**: Stocks, crypto, forex, futures - all in one system
- **⚡ Real-time Processing**: Async architecture for millisecond decision-making
- **🛡️ Risk Management**: Built-in safeguards to protect capital
- **📈 Backtesting**: Test strategies on years of historical data

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

### Research Station (Recommended)

```bash
cd website
python3 BULLETPROOF_STARTUP.py
```

This orchestrated startup:
- Starts all API servers in correct order
- Validates each service with health checks
- Opens browser only when 100% ready

### Trading Agent

```bash
# Paper trading (test without real money)
python -m src.main --mode paper

# Backtesting
python -m src.backtest --strategy claude_momentum --start 2023-01-01

# Live trading (after thorough testing!)
python -m src.main --mode live
```

---

## 📦 Installation

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/gravity-ven/Spartan_Labs.git
cd Spartan_Labs

# Create virtual environment
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate

# Install dependencies
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Configure environment
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your API keys
```

---

## 🔑 API Keys Required

### Free APIs
- **FRED API**: Economic data (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/)
- **Yahoo Finance**: Market data via yfinance (no key needed)
- **CoinGecko**: Cryptocurrency data (no key needed)

### Premium APIs (Optional)
- **Polygon.io**: Real-time stock data
- **Alpha Vantage**: Alternative market data
- **Anthropic**: Claude AI for trading agent

### Broker APIs (For Trading)
- Alpaca (stocks): https://alpaca.markets/
- Interactive Brokers: https://www.interactivebrokers.com/

---

## 📚 Documentation

### Research Station
- [Barometers Setup](BAROMETERS_README.md)
- [Breakthrough Insights](BREAKTHROUGH_INSIGHTS_README.md)
- [Architecture Mantra](ARCHITECTURE_MANTRA.md)
- [Config Central](CONFIG_CENTRAL.md)

### Trading Agent
- [Architecture Overview](ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [Getting Started](GETTING_STARTED.md)
- [Breakout Edge Strategy](BREAKOUT_EDGE.md)
- [Complete Guide](COMPLETE_GUIDE.md)

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

**IMPORTANT**:
- This platform is for **informational and educational purposes only**
- **Not financial advice** or investment recommendations
- Trading involves substantial risk of loss
- Start with paper trading before using real capital
- The authors are not responsible for any financial losses
- Always verify critical data with official sources

---

## 🤝 Contributing

Contributions are welcome! See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.

---

## 📄 License

MIT License - See LICENSE file for details.

---

**Last Updated:** November 2025

Simply open `index.html` in your browser: ```bash # Using Python 3 python3 -m http.server 8000 # Then visit: http://localhost:8000 ``` 2. Or double-click `index.html` to open directly in your browser ### Using Real Data Endpoints The dashboard currently uses **simulated data** for demonstration. Real-Time Data Updates - Market data updates every 30 seconds - Economic indicators refresh every 5 minutes - Automatic timestamp tracking ### 2. Your Indicator
